wind_info: Hitrost vetra je izmerjeno s povprečno hitrostjo vetra čez daljše obdobje. Sunki so nenadni sunki vetra, ki običajno trajajo manj kot dvajset sekund.
visibility_info: Vidljivost meri razdaljo, pri kateri se predmeti na nebu ali v obzorju še lahko vidijo. Na vidljivost lahko vplivajo padavine, megla, prah, dim ali meglica.
humidity_info: Relativna vlažnost je odstotek vodne pare, prisotne v zraku, v primerjavi z največjo količino, ki jo zrak lahko zadrži pri določeni temperaturi.
humidity_info_2: Točka rosišča je temperatura, na katero bi se moralo ohladiti, da bi dosegli relativno vlažnost 100 %.
uv_index_info: UV indeks meri moč sončnega ultravijoličnega (UV) sevanja. Je na lestvici od 0 do 11, pri čemer višje vrednosti pomenijo močnejše UV sevanje.
uv_index_info_2: UV-sevanje lahko povzroči sončne opekline, kožnega raka in poškodbe oči. Višji kot je UV indeks, večje je tveganje za te težave
uv_index_info_3: 1-2: Nizka. zaščita ni potrebna. Varno lahko ostanete zunaj z minimalno zaščito pred soncem.
uv_index_info_4: 3-7: Zmerno do visoko. Potrebna zaščita. Iščite senco od poznega jutra do sredine popoldneva. Ko ste zunaj, na izpostavljeno kožo izdatno nanesite kremo za sončenje s širokim spektrom SPF-15 ali višjo ter nosite zaščitno obleko, klobuk s širokimi krajci in sončna očala.
uv_index_info_5: 8+: Zelo visoko do ekstremno. Potrebna dodatna zaščita. Bodite previdni zunaj, zlasti od poznega jutra do sredine popoldneva. Če je vaša senca krajša od vas, poiščite senco in nosite zaščitno obleko, klobuk s širokimi krajci in sončna očala ter na izpostavljeno kožo izdatno nanesite najmanj SPF-15 zaščito pred soncem širokega spektra.
air_quality_satisfactory: Kakovost zraka je zadovoljiva, onesnaženost zraka predstavlja malo ali nič tveganja.
warming_temp_trend_1: V naslednjih dneh se pričakuje otoplitev.
warming_temp_trend_2: Temperature se bodo kmalu dvignile, pripravite se na vročino!
warming_temp_trend_3: Kaže, da bo ta teden še topleje.
cooling_temp_trend_1: V naslednjih dneh se pričakuje ohladitev.
cooling_temp_trend_2: Temperature bodo kmalu padle, ostanite na toplem!
cooling_temp_trend_3: V prihodnjih dneh se bo ohladilo.
check_your_internet_connection_try_again: Preverite omrežno povezavo in poskusite ponovno.
contributors_sub: Poglej osebe, ki so prispevale k projektu
get_clothing_suggestions: Pridobi predlog za oblačila in aktivnosti
show_alerts_home_page_sub: Pokaži vremenska opozorila na domači strani
moon_info_8: Pojemajoči polmesec: Ko je pred mlajem viden le majhen delček lune. Osvetljenost: 49%-1%.
moon_info_9: Padajoči polmesec: Ko je pred mlajem viden le majhen delček lune. Osvetljenost: 49%-1%.
swipe_between_locations_sub: Podrsaj levo ali desno za spremembo lokacije
swipe_threshold_help_sub: The threshold defines the minimum distance a swipe gesture must cover to be recognized. A lower threshold makes swipe gestures easier to trigger, while a higher threshold requires more deliberate swipes.
creator: Ustvaril(a)
export_data_sub: Export all your settings, locations, and their last fetched weather data—literally everything!
import_data_sub: Warning: Importing will erase your current app data
froggy_summary_sub: Adds frog-related descriptions. Available only in English
temp_animation_sub_pref: Counts the temperatures from start to end
info_home_location_tip: Shrani lokacijo, da jo lahko uporabiš kot privzeto
weather_model_info_2: Combines all weather models from this into a seamless prediction
used_app_storage_info_sub: Storage shows how much of the available space the app is using for saved locations. If it reaches 100%, you can no longer save additional locations
aqi_info_us: The US AQI (Air Quality Index) is a measurement used to communicate the level of air pollution. It ranges from 0 to 500, with higher values indicating worse air quality.
aqi_info_eu: The EU AQI (Air Quality Index) is a measurement used to communicate the level of air pollution in the European Union. It is divided into five levels, from 'Good' to 'Very Poor,' based on the concentration of key pollutants.
update_weather_data_sub: Automatically update the weather data if it's outdated when a location is clicked
delete_locations_support_sub: This action removes every saved location except your default location. Use this if your saved locations are not visible, are duplicating, or experiencing any other bugs
temperature_wind_pressure_visibility_pre: Temperature, wind, pressure, visibility, precipitation, time, AQI
activity_suggestions_daytip_humidity_3: 🧴 The air is dry. Moisturize your skin and drink plenty of water to stay hydrated.
activity_suggestions_daytip_humidity_4: 💧 Low humidity may cause dry skin or irritation. Keep a water bottle handy and avoid overexposure.
no_notification_when_a_new_version_is_re: Don't show a notification when a new version is released.
precipitation_expected_to_continue: Dež se nadaljuje naslednjih nekaj ur
edit_location_error_sub: Please fill in the field or reset it
use_device_compass_sub: Rotate wind arrow based on your phone's real-world orientation
froggy_insights_sub: Shows insights in a playfull format
show_froggy_sub: Display Froggy images based on weather conditions
primary_color_sub: Select a seed color to generate the theme
material_scheme_only_sub: Disables weather effects; uses default Material theme
bulletstempOptions_1: Expect a daytime range from {min}° to {max}°.

bulletsUVOptions_2: Strong UV expected near {uvTime} — sun protection recommended.

bulletsHUMIDITYOptions_1: {humidity}% humidity with a dew point of {dewpoint}° by {time}.
bulletsHUMIDITYOptions_2: Feels humid later — dew point near {dewpoint}° at {time}.
bulletsHUMIDITYOptions_3: Sticky conditions expected by {time} with {humidity}% humidity.
bulletsWINDOptions_1: Breezy conditions with winds up to {windSpeed} {windUnit}.
bulletsWINDOptions_2: Wind picks up during the day, reaching {windSpeed} {windUnit}.
bulletsAQIOptions_1: Air quality is poor right now — consider limiting time outside.
bulletsAQIOptions_2: Good air quality at the moment.

model_disc_2: Global forecast by ECMWF, slightly lower resolution, highly reliable worldwide.
model_disc_3: High-resolution version of ECMWF’s global model. Known for top accuracy globally.
model_disc_4: Chinese national model from CMA. Good for Asia-Pacific, less accurate globally.
model_disc_5: Global model from Australia's Bureau of Meteorology. Best for Australia & Oceania.
model_disc_6: Regional model optimized for Norway and Scandinavia. Very accurate for the Nordic region.
model_disc_7: NOAA’s blended high-res + global forecast. Balanced accuracy with faster updates.
model_disc_8: NOAA’s global model. Fast, free, decent worldwide but less precise locally.
model_disc_9: Ultra high-res short-range US model. Best for hyperlocal US forecasts (0–18h).
model_disc_10: AI-powered forecast by Google DeepMind. Experimental, smooth & cutting-edge globally.
model_disc_11: Blended Japan Meteorological Agency model. Accurate in Japan & East Asia.
model_disc_12: High-res short-range forecast for Japan. Great for 0–36h predictions in Japan.
model_disc_13: Japan’s global forecast model. Lower res but reliable in Asia-Pacific.
model_disc_14: German Weather Service’s blended ICON model. Good balance for Europe
model_disc_15: Global version of ICON. Precise forecasts worldwide, especially Europe.
model_disc_16: High-res regional ICON for Europe. Best for central & western Europe.
model_disc_17: Ultra high-res short-term forecast for Germany. Ideal for next 24–48h in DE.
model_disc_18: Environment Canada’s blended forecast. Good across North America.
model_disc_19: Canada’s global model. Reliable for global forecasts, better in northern latitudes.
model_disc_20: Canadian regional model. High detail for local areas in Canada.
model_disc_21: Ultra high-res Canadian model. Best for pinpoint weather in Canada & nearby US.
model_disc_22: Blended national model. Accurate in France & nearby countries.
model_disc_23: Global model from France. Decent worldwide, especially for French territories.
model_disc_24: Europe-focused ARPEGE. More precise than global version.
model_disc_25: High-res national model. Best for local French forecasts.
model_disc_27: High-resolution ICON model tailored by ARPAE for Italy. Ideal for detailed regional forecasts.
model_disc_28: Integrated multi-scale forecast system combining global and regional models for smooth transitions.
model_disc_29: Global model with 10km resolution. Suitable for medium-range international forecasts.
model_disc_30: High-resolution 2km model focused on the UK. Excellent for local short-term forecasting.
alerts_api_caution: Due to the API being in beta, alerts from other regions may occasionally appear
disable_battery_optimizations_sub: Disabling battery optimization is required for background updates to function properly
allow_notification_permission_sub: Permission is required for background app updates
summary_headlines_30: Expect some cloud cover later today
updates_in_the_background_sub: Allow background activity. Turning it off may stop widget updates
kmni_desc_1: Blended system integrating KNMI and ECMWF data for seamless global-to-local forecasts across scales
kmni_desc_2: High-resolution convection-permitting model covering Europe. Ideal for regional weather events and mesoscale features
kmni_desc_3: Ultra-high-resolution model focused on the Netherlands. Excellent for detailed local forecasts including precipitation and wind.
use_ai_for_summary_sub: GPT-4o Mini generates summaries of hourly, daily, and current weather, refreshing every 2 hours
background_updates_sub: Widget updates, update interval, and scheduled updates
new_version_snack_message: Show a snack message when a new version is released

locations_gesture_info_1: Swipe from right to left to delete a location
locations_gesture_info_2: Hold a location to set it as default
condition_widget_animation_sub: Controls a transform animation. Disable this if you experience lag or freezing
froggy_insight_cold_trend_1: It’s getting colder by the weekend… I’m grabbing a big leaf to hide under, ribbit
froggy_insight_cold_trend_2: Things are warming up… not my vibe, but hey, maybe you like toasty air
froggy_insight_cold_trend_3: Looks like the weather’s staying steady… calm days make a calm frog
froggy_insight_rain_probability_1_part_1: Might get a real good rain on
froggy_insight_rain_probability_1_part_2: I’m already doing my happy splash dance
froggy_insight_rain_probability_2: Some days look kinda splashy… maybe keep your stuff dry while I enjoy the puddles
froggy_insight_rain_probability_3: Dry skies all week… guess I’ll just sit and stare dramatically into the distance
froggy_insight_heatwave_1: Too many hot days coming… I’m sinking into the pond until further notice
froggy_insight_heatwave_2: There’s at least one toasty day ahead… terrible for hopping, great for melting
froggy_insight_heatwave_3: No major heat this week… perfect temperature for a lazy sun sit
froggy_insight_humidity_1: Humidity’s climbing… great for my skin, not sure about yours
froggy_insight_humidity_2: Air’s drying out… feels weird on my frog body but whatever
froggy_insight_humidity_3: Humidity’s pretty normal… nothing screaming for attention
froggy_insight_wind_1: Way too windy… almost got blown off my log last time. Not again
froggy_insight_wind_2: Kinda breezy… the reeds are doing that wiggly dance I like
froggy_insight_wind_3: Pretty calm today… perfect for staying still and pretending I’m a moss rock
froggy_insight_pleasant_weather_1: nice days ahead… I’m claiming the warmest rock before anyone else
froggy_insight_pleasant_weather_2: Some good days, some meh days… that’s life, ribbit
froggy_insight_temperature_swings_1: Big temperature jumps today… I’d bring a leaf AND a tiny blanket if I had one
froggy_insight_temperature_swings_2: Temps look steady… peaceful hopping conditions
froggy_insight_uvindex_1: Sun’s way too spicy today… I’m hiding in the shade like a wise frog
froggy_insight_uvindex_2: Sun’s a little strong… I’ll be near the cattails in case I need a quick escape
froggy_insight_uvindex_3: Low sun today… perfect lighting for dramatic posing
froggy_insight_wind_fluctuation_1: The wind’s going wild today… hold onto your hat, if you’re the kinda creature that wears one
froggy_insight_wind_fluctuation_2: Wind’s acting strange… up, down, sideways… chaotic frog energy
froggy_insight_wind_fluctuation_3: Air’s calm today… I’m sticking to my log, literally
froggy_insight_hourly_humidity_1: Humidity’s bouncing all over… weird day for a frog with sensitive vibes
froggy_insight_hourly_humidity_2: Humidity’s steady… feels pretty comfy actually
froggy_insight_clouds_1: Sky’s all covered… makes the world feel soft and cozy
froggy_insight_clouds_2: Almost no clouds… everything’s shiny and kinda blinding
froggy_insight_clouds_3: Bit of clouds, bit of sun… balanced, like a well-hydrated frog
froggy_insight_precipitation_window_1: Might get real wet later… excellent news for me personally
froggy_insight_precipitation_window_2: Some light rain might wander through… keep stuff dry while I enjoy the sprinkles
froggy_insight_precipitation_window_3: Some light rain might wander through… keep stuff dry while I enjoy the sprinkles
froggy_insight_comfort_index_1: Sticky air incoming… feels like home, kind of swampy, kind of gross
froggy_insight_comfort_index_2: Air feels comfy… great for slow, lazy sitting
froggy_insight_comfort_index_3: Dry air today… crisp hopping weather
froggy_insight_clothing_1: Super hot week… if I could, I’d just chill in the pond all day
froggy_insight_clothing_2: Warm days ahead… you might wear shorts, I’m sticking with my classic no-clothes look
froggy_insight_clothing_3: Cooler air coming… you may want a jacket; I’m fine because I’m slimy
froggy_insight_clothing_4: Cold week… bundle up or find a warm rock to sit on
froggy_insight_visibility_1: Foggy morning ahead… tough to spot bugs, I gotta rely on my ears
froggy_insight_visibility_2: A little misty… makes the pond look mystical, I like it
froggy_insight_visibility_3: Clear visibility… I can see all the way across the reeds
froggy_insight_record_temps_1: Whoa… might hit record heat. I’m diving deep until it’s over
froggy_insight_record_temps_2: Brr… maybe record cold. My toes are shaking just thinking about it
froggy_insight_record_temps_3: Nothing record-breaking… just normal weather stuff
best_match_full_best_for: Users unsure what model to pick
best_match_full_notes: Automatically selects the most appropriate model based on location and forecast range.
ECMWF_IFS_0.4°_full_countries: Fully global (no regional specialization; consistent performance worldwide)
ECMWF_IFS_0.4°_full_notes: Very reliable but lower spatial resolution than the 0.25° version. Great fallback model.
ECMWF_IFS_0.25°_full_notes: Arguably the most accurate public global model. Used by many national agencies. Slower updates than GFS.
CMA_GRAPES_Global_full_notes: Lower global reliability. Performs best around East Asia.
BOM_ACCESS_Global_full_notes: Tailored for Southern Hemisphere. High-quality over AU/Oceania.
MET_Norway_Nordic_full_best_for: Local precision for Norway, Sweden, Finland
MET_Norway_Nordic_full_notes: Uses MET Norway’s in-house regional models. Very accurate in Nordic terrain.
GFS_Seamless_full_notes: Combines GFS high-res short-term with long-range. Good balance between speed and reliability.
GFS_Global_full_notes: Slightly less accurate than ECMWF, but faster and more frequently updated.
GFS_HRRR__full_notes: Super high-res (3km). Best for storms, hourly planning, airport ops.
GFS_GraphCast_full_notes: DeepMind’s AI forecast. Still experimental. Very good for visual consistency but not battle-tested yet.
JMA_Seamless_full_notes: National model with decent resolution. Blends short and long range.
JMA_MSM_full_notes: Very high resolution, excellent for metro areas like Tokyo or Osaka.
JMA_GSM_full_notes: Not as sharp as ECMWF or GFS, but stable in East Asia.
ICON_Seamless_full_notes: Transitions smoothly between resolutions. Good for large European areas.
ICON_Global_full_notes: Strong model globally. Among best for Germany and Central Europe.
ICON_EU_full_notes: High-res model. Great for terrain-rich regions.
ICON_D2_full_notes: Very detailed — cities, valleys, small regions.
GEM_Seamless_full_notes: Blended with HRDPS and regional models. Good balance.
GEM_Global_full_notes: Moderate global accuracy, optimized for polar areas.
GEM_Regional_full_notes: High-res version for populated areas like Toronto, Quebec, Vancouver.
GEM_HRDPS_Continental_full_notes: Very high-res (2.5km). Focused on precision forecasting.
Météo_France_Seamless_full_best_for: General use in France and nearby countries
Météo_France_Seamless_full_notes: Blended for smoother transitions. High confidence over France.
Météo_France_ARPEGE_France_HD_full_notes: Excellent detail — rain, fog, wind, storm.
ItaliaMeteo_ARPAE_ICON_2I_full_notes: Based on ICON with ARPAE tuning. Strong for mountainous terrain.
UKMO_Seamless_full_notes: Smooth model transitions. Good for flights, sea, and national forecasts.
UKMO_Global_10km_full_notes: Strong global model. Good tropical performance.
UKMO_UK_2km_full_notes: One of the best models for dense urban UK settings.
KNMI_Seamless_with_ECMWF_full_notes: Combines KNMI short-range and ECMWF global models. Useful for aviation, marine, and national-level planning.
KNMI_Harmonie_Arome_Europe_full_best_for: Mesoscale weather features (e.g. thunderstorms, wind gusts)
KNMI_Harmonie_Arome_Europe_full_countrie: European countries including Netherlands, Belgium, Germany, France
KNMI_Harmonie_Arome_Europe_full_notes: Convection-permitting resolution. Very good for regional forecasting across European terrain.
KNMI_Harmonie_Arome_Netherlands_full_not: Ultra-fine resolution. Excellent for precipitation, wind, and local effects like sea breezes or fog.
cool_afternoon_1: A cool afternoon with mild conditions
chilly_evening_1: Temperatures drop into a chilly evening
chilly_evening_2: Cool air moves in after sunset
precip_info_new: Precipitation amount describes how much precipitation is expected, typically given in millimeters (mm) or inches. It helps indicate the intensity — from light showers to heavy downpours.
precip_info_2_new: Precipitation probability shows the chance of precipitation occurring at a given time and location, expressed as a percentage. For example, a 70% chance means precipitation is likely in that area.
precip_info_3_new: Precipitation duration indicates the total number of hours during the day that precipitation is expected. This helps estimate how long the weather might stay wet or overcast.
precip_info_4_new: Precipitation intensity measures how heavy the precipitation is during a given period, typically classified as light, moderate, or heavy. Heavier precipitation can lead to flooding or reduced visibility.
